overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a video game, featuring dense vegetation and trees lining a narrow dirt path.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow forest trail at night, with a flashlight illuminating the dirt path ahead. Dense vegetation and tall grass line both sides of the trail, while a large tree trunk becomes visible in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail passing large tree and wooden debris

events.description: passing close by the large tree trunk on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path, passing a large tree trunk and approaching fallen wooden debris

entered.detail: fallen wooden beams or branches visible on the right side of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the forest trail, the camera passes close by the large tree trunk that was previously in the distance. Fallen wooden debris becomes visible on the right side as the path continues deeper into the dark forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow forest trail at night, transitioning from an open path into the deeper, more cluttered heart of the woods. It begins with a flashlight illuminating a dirt path flanked by dense vegetation and tall grass, while a large tree trunk looms in the distance to the right. As the camera advances, the perspective closes in on that massive trunk, passing it closely as the surrounding darkness presses in. The scene then shifts further into the forest, where the path becomes increasingly obstructed by fallen wooden debris scattered along the right side.
